title: alcea digitata
intro: Alcea digitata, also known as the Siberian hollyhock, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the mallow family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Alcea digitata include its ability to aid in digestive issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. Alcea digitata is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in ointments and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
